dimensions.evidence: Only 2 of 5 tests fully meet plan spec: TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions; TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported) not TierGeneric; TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd; TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored relies on nil-return rather than asserting maintainability!=0.95
Diff touches only internal/engine/scorer_test.go — the single target file from the plan — with zero unrelated churn
No tests deleted or weakened; no hard-coded expected values; DefaultsNotInjected uses wrong language but not to game a pass; AggregateSkipsUnsupported honestly Skip'd with TODO(#25)
Tests-only change with no production code modified; no doc-comment/code mismatch; zero correctness or regression risk from adding test functions

failureReasons: TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA missing plan-required Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions — only checks nil scores
TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported language) instead of TierGeneric unit as plan explicitly requires, weakening the guard against old-default injection
TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd — plan requirement #5 entirely unimplemented
TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored relies on TierGeneric nil-return shortcut rather than specifically asserting maintainability dimension is NOT 0.95 as plan mandates
